San Francisco City Hall is easily one of the most impressive civic buildings in the country. The massive dome, inspired by classical European architecture, rises above Civic Center and makes the building visible from many parts of the city. From the outside it’s striking, but the real magic happens once you step inside.

The interior is stunning, with a grand marble staircase, soaring ceilings, and beautiful natural light filling the rotunda. It’s no surprise that it’s one of the most popular places in the city for weddings and special events. The craftsmanship and scale of the building make it feel both historic and monumental.

A few of us from the staff at The Green Cross always recommend stopping by City Hall when exploring the Civic Center area. Whether you admire it from the outside or take a walk through the interior, it’s one of the architectural highlights of San Francisco. 🏛️🌉
